rules.logic: Eligible areas lack forest cover since 31 December 1989 and meet host-country forest thresholds at maturity.
rules.text: Projects reforest lands without forest cover since 1989 and comply with national forest definitions.
rules.title: Projects reforest lands without forest cover since 1989 and comply with national forest definitions.
when: Historical imagery confirms non-forest status since 1989.

rules.logic: Baseline carbon stock estimates rely on Tool 02 sampling guidance or conservative IPCC defaults.
rules.text: Baseline biomass estimated using IPCC defaults or site-specific sampling following Tool 02.
rules.title: Baseline biomass estimated using IPCC defaults or site-specific sampling following Tool 02.
when: Baseline strata documentation provided to DOE.

rules.logic: Net anthropogenic GHG removals computed by summing project removals and subtracting baseline emissions and leakage deductions.
rules.text: Net anthropogenic removals equal project removals minus baseline emissions and leakage.
rules.title: Net anthropogenic removals equal project removals minus baseline emissions and leakage.
when: All carbon pools accounted for unless exclusion justified.
Leakage deduction applied before reporting net removal.

rules.logic: Activity shifting leakage calculated with Tool 14 standardized factors and subtracted from project removals each monitoring period.
rules.text: Activity shifting leakage quantified annually using Tool 14 and deducted from net removals.
rules.title: Activity shifting leakage quantified annually using Tool 14 and deducted from net removals.

rules.logic: Buffer share determined using Tool 15 risk analysis and recorded with registry documentation.
rules.text: Non-permanence risks addressed through buffer contributions per Tool 15 guidance.
rules.title: Non-permanence risks addressed through buffer contributions per Tool 15 guidance.
when: Risk assessment updated at each verification.
Buffer transactions included in monitoring report.

rules.logic: Permanent sample plots measured at ≤5-year intervals with QA/QC re-measurement requirements.
rules.text: Field biomass measurements conducted at least every five years using permanent plots.
rules.title: Field biomass measurements conducted at least every five years using permanent plots.
when: Plot access maintained for full crediting period.

rules.logic: When sampling precision exceeds 10%, apply Tool 12 conservative deductions before issuing credits.
rules.text: Sampling uncertainty above 10% addressed with Tool 12 conservative adjustments.
rules.title: Sampling uncertainty above 10% addressed with Tool 12 conservative adjustments.

rules.logic: Monitoring submissions include updated spatial data, field measurements, leakage results, and QA/QC documentation.
rules.text: Monitoring reports consolidate maps, inventory data, leakage deductions, and QA/QC evidence.
rules.title: Monitoring reports consolidate maps, inventory data, leakage deductions, and QA/QC evidence.
when: Supporting datasets archived with version history.
